where.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_site us WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.site_id = p.site_id AND us.deleted_at IS NULL )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_site us WHERE us.user_id = #{userId} AND us.site_id = p.site_id AND us.deleted_at IS NULL )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id

SELECT a.status AS stat_key, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id
GROUP BY a.status

SELECT a.type AS stat_key, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id
GROUP BY a.type

SELECT a.source AS stat_key, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id
GROUP BY a.source

SELECT DATE(a.triggered_at) AS stat_date, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM alert a LEFT JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = a.panel_id
GROUP BY DATE(a.triggered_at) ORDER BY stat_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai INNER JOIN circuit c ON c.circuit_id = ai.circuit_id INNER JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = c.panel_id

SELECT ai.verdict AS stat_key, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM ai_diagnosis_result ai INNER JOIN circuit c ON c.circuit_id = ai.circuit_id INNER JOIN panel p ON p.panel_id = c.panel_id
GROUP BY ai.verdict
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE
SELECT p.status AS stat_key, COUNT(*) AS stat_count FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE GROUP BY p.status
